Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals.thresholdfactor.QualityScoreMapper

  • Packages that use QualityScoreMapper 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals.thresholdfactor  

    • Uses of QualityScoreMapper in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals.thresholdfactor

      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals.thresholdfactor that implement QualityScoreMapper 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  DefaultAccelerometerQualityScoreMapper
      Default implementation to map a given measurement into a given quality score to be used for accelerometer calibration.
      class  DefaultGyroscopeQualityScoreMapper
      Default implementation to map a given measurement into a given quality score to be used for gyroscope calibration.
      class  DefaultMagnetometerQualityScoreMapper
      Default implementation to map a given measurement into a given quality score to be used for accelerometer calibration.

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private QualityScoreMapper<com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> AccelerometerAndGyroscopeIntervalDetectorThresholdFactorOptimizer.mAccelerometerQualityScoreMapper
